name: band-interaction
description: Table with band1Horz (gray D9D9D9), band2Horz (white), band1Vert (blue BDD7EE), band2Vert (white). Both horizontal and vertical banding enabled.
expected_behavior: Per 17.7.6: banded rows override banded columns. Cell (0,0): band1Horz row + band1Vert col -> gray (D9D9D9) from band row. Cell (0,1): band1Horz row + band2Vert col -> gray (D9D9D9) from band row. Cell (1,0): band2Horz row + band1Vert col -> white from band row. Band rows always win over band columns at intersection.
current_status: GAP — current code applies band columns after band rows (wrong precedence)
